summary: Iteration 41: Complete testing of Subscription UI billing toggle, document card thumbnails, and beneficiary payment lifecycle features. All 23 backend tests passed. All 9 frontend features verified. Billing toggle dynamically updates prices (Monthly/Quarterly/Annual). Document thumbnails render PDF first-page previews and image previews on vault cards.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test documents: PDF (52e87c23-ab92-4faf-a919-fc5b93720058), Image (eee6042c-2187-471c-92f2-5aafc8f5858c)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscription billing toggle fully functional. DocThumbnail component renders PDF first-page using react-pdf and images using img tags. Beneficiary payment lifecycle endpoints working. Stripe checkout returns beta mode error as expected.

tested_features.vault_thumbnails_pdf: PASS - Document cards show PDF first-page preview thumbnails using react-pdf
tested_features.vault_thumbnails_image: PASS - Document cards show image preview thumbnails as actual images
tested_features.eye_button_pdf_viewer: PASS - Eye button on document cards opens PDFViewerModal correctly
tested_features.billing_toggle_monthly: PASS - Monthly billing option displays prices ($9.99, $8.99, $7.99)
tested_features.billing_toggle_quarterly: PASS - Quarterly billing shows 10% discount ($8.99, $8.09, $7.19) with '-10%' badge
tested_features.billing_toggle_annual: PASS - Annual billing shows 20% discount ($7.99, $7.19, $6.39) with '-20%' badge
tested_features.subscribe_button_stripe_checkout: PASS - Subscribe button calls /api/subscriptions/checkout endpoint, returns beta mode message
tested_features.subscription_component_loads: PASS - Settings page shows subscription management component without errors
tested_features.beneficiary_plans_displayed: PASS - GET /api/subscriptions/plans returns beneficiary_plans with quarterly_price and annual_price

backend_tests.test_preview_pdf_returns_blob: PASS - Returns PDF blob with correct content-type
backend_tests.test_preview_image_returns_blob: PASS - Returns image blob with correct content-type
backend_tests.test_status_returns_user_role: PASS - Returns user_role for role-aware plan display

ui_verification.billing_toggle_ui: Three buttons: Monthly, Quarterly (-10%), Annual (-20%) with visual badges
ui_verification.price_display: Prices update dynamically: $9.99→$8.99→$7.99 for Premium when switching billing
ui_verification.billing_labels: /month, /mo billed quarterly, /mo billed annually shown correctly
ui_verification.plan_cards: Premium (Most Popular label), Standard, Base, New Adult, Military, Hospice displayed
ui_verification.subscribe_buttons: 6 subscribe buttons present, triggers beta mode toast when clicked
ui_verification.beta_banner: Beta Access — All features unlocked banner displayed
ui_verification.thumbnails: PDF shows gray first-page preview, Image shows blue actual image preview

mocked_api_note: Stripe checkout returns beta mode error - this is expected behavior since beta_mode is enabled
